creator: jgh@FreeBSD.org
text:
Simplify GOOGLE_CODE MASTER_SITE with PROJECTHOST definition.

INSTALL_SCRIPT installs with 555, so chmod may be dropped, or use:

INSTALL_SCRIPT -m <mode> ${WRKDIR}/youtube-viewer ${PREFIX}/bin/

Port maintainer (dhn@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.99_6 (mode: change, diff: ports)
